ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "score" REAL /* Financial score based on various metrics */,
  "savings" REAL /* Savings amount in the individual's account */,
  "income" REAL /* Income amount received by the individual */,
  "address_time" INTEGER /* Time at current address in months */,
  "employed_time" INTEGER /* Time employed in months */,
  "fte" TEXT /* Full-time equivalent status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., full-time, part-time, unemployed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual's record was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES employment_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings" (
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each savings entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual associated with the savings account */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount saved */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank holding the savings account */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the savings account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of savings account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the savings record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the savings record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income source */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual receiving the income */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of income source (e.g., salary, freelance) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of income from this source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of income (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_sources_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial score entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual for whom the score is recorded */,
  "score" REAL /* Financial score value */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial score record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_scores_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the individual worked */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the individual */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the advisor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the advisor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty area of the advisor (e.g., retirement planning) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advisor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advisor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisory_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisory session */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual receiving advice */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advising financial advisor */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the advisory session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the advisory session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advisory session record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advisory session record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisory_sessions_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisory_sessions_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual for whom the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_income" REAL /* Predicted future income */,
  "predicted_savings" REAL /* Predicted future savings */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial trend */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual related to the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing savings, decreasing income) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial trend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial trend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_trends_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, financial advisor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_communications" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual receiving the email */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the email */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the email was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the email record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the email record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_communications_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_communications" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone call */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual receiving the call */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date when the call was made */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the call */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phone call record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phone call record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phone_communications_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)
